title: kxpack
description:
簡單優化整合包 
Simple optimization modpack
body:
高高的fabric懶人包上線囉！
此模組包以元素符號的優化模組為主
(包含Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore)，
另外加上其他更加優化的模組還有方便遊玩輔助模組，
此模組包的目的是幫助配備較差的電腦可以更順利地遊玩，
並讓原本設備好的電腦獲得更佳的遊戲體驗。
可以基於此模組包再去添加其他富有特色的模組，讓遊戲更加豐富。
祝遊戲愉快！
The kxpack is now available!
This modpack primarily focuses on optimization mods with element symbols
(including Sodium, Lithium, Indium, FerriteCore, and Krypton).
It also includes additional optimization mods and convenient gameplay assistance mods.
The goal of this modpack is to help lower-end computers run the game more smoothly,
while also providing a better gaming experience for higher-end machines.
You can add other unique mods to this pack to enrich your gameplay experience.
Enjoy the game!
